The haughty peer gloats down at you from across the room, somehow managing to appear unbothered by the intrusion of an offworlder and [pc.hisHer] mercenary assistant. She watches you with the sort of matriarchal displeasure a mother might lavish upon a prodigal [pc.sonDaughter]. For her part she seems unmoved to directly attack you, but her pet... when she looks at her pet, the hardest parts of her statuesque features soften.

Meeker than the other peer in the fight, this one’s face twists with worry and concern for her pet, yet not a single ounce of fear of you. Fear of her cohorts’ disdain is a far more powerful motivator. Her green visor, stylish skirt, and padded shoulders would make her a real hit at one of Dhaal’s clubs - or [targetFactionName]’s boardrooms.
Sneak Attack
Multiple Attacks
Multiple Shots
Evasive

All the confidence has slipped out of the spy’s crimson eyes. In its place something else has risen, something flickering yet fierce. She bites her lip when she looks at you. When she moves, you swear you hear a faint fluid sloshing from inside her suit. She can’t even try to hide the flush spreading across her cheeks or the cute little pants coming out of her mouth when she sees you move. All you have to do is keep turning her on, and she’ll fold like a house of cards.

The spy’s healing stim did more than heal her wounds. It flushed her cheeks. It lit flames of arousal that flicker behind her determined, crimson eyes. Sure, she still holds her weapons just as dangerously as before, and her hips sway with enough agility to sidestep the deadliest plasma-bolt, but you’ve found a chink in her armor: arousal. If a little chemical stimulation can set the curvaceous femme fatale aflutter, then a hands-on approach could do oh so much more!
She can’t handle another one of those!

She shakes her head, mutters something under her breath that sounds like, “Fuckin’ tainted meds...” and tries to get in a combat-ready pose once more, though her movements are more awkward. Her legs keep drifting too far apart...
“Eyes up here, Rusher.” The spy tosses her hair. Are her cheeks flushed?
